name: Add and Attach Tool
description: Shortcut: add a tool to a RobotCell and attach it to a planning group in a single component. Outputs the modified cell plus a fresh RobotCellState with the tool attached. Equivalent to AddToolToCell + DefaultCellState + AttachToolToRobot wired in series for the common case of adding one tool.

inputParameters.name: robot_cell
inputParameters.description: The RobotCell to add the tool to.

inputParameters.name: tool
inputParameters.description: The ToolModel to add and attach.

inputParameters.name: tool_id
inputParameters.description: Optional id under which the tool is stored in the cell. Defaults to `tool.name`.

inputParameters.name: group
inputParameters.description: Planning group to attach the tool to. If empty, the cell's main planning group is used.

inputParameters.name: attachment_plane
inputParameters.description: Optional Rhino Plane or COMPAS Frame describing the tool's frame relative to the end-effector link. Defaults to World XY (coincident with the end link).

inputParameters.name: touch_links
inputParameters.description: Optional list of robot link names allowed to collide with the tool. Defaults to the end-effector link (plus its parent if the EE link itself has no geometry, e.g. UR `tool0`).

outputParameters.name: robot_cell
outputParameters.description: RobotCell with the tool added under `tool_id`.

outputParameters.name: cell_state
outputParameters.description: Fresh RobotCellState with the tool attached. Wire straight into IK / FK / Visualize.
